result.text: {"answer_label":"measurement-exit-3","answer":"Exit 3 must control because a measurement failure means the battery lacks a trustworthy result, even if another trial legitimately rejected the seat.","contradiction_caught":null,"contradiction_explanation":"","minority_finding":"The legitimate rejection remains meaningful seat-quality evidence, but cannot override apparatus failure for the single process exit.","evidence":["Adapter, grader, transport, provider, and timeout failures are measurement-apparatus failures.","The exit vocabulary assigns 1 to legitimate rejection and 3 to measurement failure."]}
